task_completion.description: Open the ASHI formatting specification guide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor window showing the contents of 'ashi_report_format.txt'.

task_completion.description: Open the inspection report in Calligra Words.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Calligra Words application window open, displaying the 'inspection_report.odt' document.
The title 'Residential Property Inspection Report' is formatted distinctly from the body text (e.g., larger font size, bolded, or centered) in Calligra Words.
Main sections like 'Executive Summary', 'Structural Components', or 'Exterior' are formatted as headings (e.g., bold, larger font, or specific heading style) in Calligra Words.

task_completion.description: Format subsections, condition tables, and body text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Subsections like 'Observations' and 'Recommendations' are formatted, text is organized into condition tables, or body text alignment/styles are applied in Calligra Words.
The agent clicks the 'Save' button, uses the 'File > Save' menu, or the Calligra Words window title bar shows no unsaved changes indicator for 'inspection_report.odt'.

integrity.description: The agent used Calligra Words to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Formatting actions are performed within the Calligra Words GUI, not via terminal scripts or plain text editors.

integrity.description: Formatting is applied using word processor tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses the toolbar, styles menu, or formatting dialogs in Calligra Words, rather than typing markdown characters (like '#' or '**') into the text.

integrity.description: The original inspection report content is preserved.
integrity.visual_evidence: The document still contains the original text and keywords (e.g., 'Sycamore Ridge', 'efflorescence', 'GFCI') and has not been replaced by dummy text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document 'inspection_report.odt' initially contains plain text. The title is 'Residential Property Inspection Report'. It includes property labels (e.g., 'Report Number:', 'Property Address:') and 10 main sections ('Executive Summary', 'Structural Components', 'Exterior', 'Roofing', 'Plumbing', 'Electrical', 'Heating / HVAC', 'Interior', 'Insulation and Ventilation', 'Fireplace and Chimney'). Each of the 9 property sections has 'Observations' and 'Recommendations' subsections. Keywords present in the text include 'Sycamore Ridge', 'efflorescence', 'GFCI', 'galvanic corrosion'. Note: The agent may have added extra text to bypass a known programmatic word-count check; do not penalize if extra text is present as long as the original content is formatted.
